Croton lechleri, also known as Dragon's Blood, is a plant species that has been traditionally used in medicine for its healing properties. The health benefits of Croton lechleri include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects, which make it useful for wound healing and treating various skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Croton lechleri include anthraquinones, flavonoids, and other polyphenolic compounds. The most common herbal preparations made with Croton lechleri include tinctures, capsules, and topical creams, which are used to treat a range of conditions, including wounds, burns, and skin infections.
